top_signals.title: US Stocks Pause as AI Rally Faces Fresh Scrutiny: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks mirrored the cautious moves across most asset classes as traders considered whether earnings justified further advances in the artificial intelligence trade and uncertainty swirled around the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Two groups of bitcoin investors sell on the rise as U.S. inflation lifts prices to nearly $65,000
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: South Korea to Halt New Listings of Single Stock Leveraged ETFs
top_signals.summary: South Korea will temporarily halt new listings of single-stock leveraged exchange traded products to curb market volatility after a surge in popularity of funds tied to Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US senator blasts AG pick for ‘dismantling’ crypto unit, Trump’s CZ pardon
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump’s pick for attorney general faced criticism from members of the Senate Judiciary Committee on his approach to crypto enforcement and the pardon of former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Partners Group Slumps as It Sees Evergreens Slowing Growth
top_signals.summary: Partners Group Holding AG reiterated that asset growth could be slowed by its evergreen funds, highlighting the difficult conditions it’s operating in.
